sub_modules.fp_unpack: Unpacks IEEE-754 operands, applies subtraction sign inversion to operand B, builds extended significands, and detects zero/inf/NaN classes.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles NaN propagation, infinity propagation, invalid infinity cancellation, and signed zero canonicalization.
sub_modules.fp_align: Compares operand magnitudes, selects the larger significand, aligns the smaller significand with sticky-bit preservation, and forwards signs.
sub_modules.fp_addsub: Adds or subtracts aligned significands according to effective signs and produces an unsigned magnitude with result sign.
sub_modules.fp_normalize: Normalizes the post-add/sub magnitude, adjusts exponent, detects exact zero, and prepares guard/round/sticky bits.
sub_modules.fp_round_pack: Applies round-to-nearest-even, detects overflow/underflow, and packs the IEEE-754 single-precision result.
